id.description: Stable kebab-case id. Also the filename of a bespoke figure: figures/exercises/<id>.svg (optional).

aliases.description: Other ways people write this in a spreadsheet. Matching is case- and punctuation-insensitive, and common abbreviations (db, bb, ohp, rdl...) are expanded before matching, so you don't need to list those.

pattern.description: One of the ids in patterns.json. Drives the fallback figure and the grouping.

figure.description: Optional. Override figure id. Defaults to <id> if a bespoke figure exists, else the pattern's figure.

pitfalls.description: 1-2 sentences naming the main thing(s) to avoid.
